## Thank you for contributing to the Master Hub! 🚀

Before submitting this Pull Request, please make sure you have checked off all the boxes below. This helps us review and merge your project much faster!

### 📋 Pre-Flight Checklist
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` guide.
- [ ] I have placed my project in a sequentially numbered folder (e.g., `25_project_name`).
- [ ] My `.ino` file perfectly matches my folder name.
- [ ] I have included a `README.md` that perfectly follows the copy-paste template in the contributing guide.
- [ ] I have actually tested this code on a physical Arduino board and verified it works.

### 📝 What does this PR do?
*(Please briefly describe the project you are adding. What component does it use?)*

### 🌐 Tinkercad Link Included?
- [ ] Yes! I built a virtual circuit and included the link in my README.
- [ ] No, Tinkercad does not support the component I used.

---
*If this is your first ever Pull Request, welcome to open-source! We are thrilled to have you.* 🎉
